content:
I've been spending some time learning Three.js and decided to build a small space game to explore what's possible in the browser.
The game uses vanilla JavaScript and Three.js in a single HTML file. I focused on moving to feel smooth and adding little details like a follow camera, GLTF models, object recycling for asteroids, a loading screen, Web Audio, and a few visual effects to make flying through space feel more immersive.
It's still an early prototype, but I'd love to hear what other web developers think, especially if you've built interactive 3D experiences on the web.
Play it here: https://www.pixelfork.ai/publish/427c8525-7c10-441d-8bee-0bc9bd60a9c0

  submitted by   /u/ineedthealgorithm
